title: New York State of Mind
why_this_song: New York State of Mind by Billy Joel (1976) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: The New York Times, The Daily News
And it's fine with me 'cause I've let it slide
Don't care if it's Chinatown or on Riverside
I'm in a New York state of mind

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "york" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "york" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "state" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "state" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Some folks like to get away
Been high in the Rockies under the evergreens

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Take a holiday from the neighborhood
Out of touch with the rhythm and blues
It was so easy living day by day

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "New York State of Mind" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "New York State of Mind" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "New York State of Mind" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "New York State of Mind"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Billy Joel one question about "New York State of Mind", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Billy Joel sobre "New York State of Mind", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
